description: Extraction streams records to a callback rather than collecting all in memory
steps: Assert callback is invoked for each message without collecting into Vec
Assert peak memory usage does not scale with message count (test with 10k messages)

description: Rayon parallel processing accelerates multi-chat extraction by at least 1.5x on 4+ cores
steps: Build a large test DB with 10 chats × 1000 messages each
Assert parallel is faster on multi-core (skip on single-core CI with #[cfg])
